title: Simpal
description: A modpack for clean and optimized gameplay.
body:
# Simpal

A Modpack for Modern Minecraft.

**Simpal** features a complete overhaul to the UI, smooth animations and mindblowing performance. Alongside the best optimization mods available, Simpal manages consistent framerates in challenging conditions.

With client-side mods only, Simpal works with any vanilla Minecraft server.

_More game versions coming soon._

---

Check out the **Alpha Demo** to see how Simpal holds up.
